textPlain:
What’s the state of scheme today?
Seems like the main two ones that are popular are Racket/Chez and Guile.There’s also like Chicken, and Gerbil/Gambit, but I see less people using them.What scheme would you recommend for real world applications and compiling to a standalone executable?
There is also s7 which can be embedded in C applications seamlessly.https://ccrma.stanford.edu/software/snd/snd/s7.html
